overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Welcome to your CauseFlow AI dashboard

tour.welcomeDesc: Welcome, Detective. Your command center is ready. Let me show you around before your first mission.
tour.hqDesc: This is your war room. Active cases, team health, credits remaining — everything at a glance. The numbers update in real-time as your investigations unfold.
tour.caseFilesDesc: This is where the action happens. Every production incident becomes a case. Create investigations, trace root causes, and close cases faster than your team ever thought possible.
tour.evidenceRoomDesc: Connect your tools — Slack, GitHub, AWS, Datadog, PagerDuty — and let CauseFlow gather evidence from every source automatically. More connections = faster resolutions.
tour.squadDesc: No detective works alone. Invite your engineers, assign roles, and collaborate on investigations. Every team member sees the same real-time evidence.
tour.intelDesc: CauseFlow learns from every case you solve. Pattern recognition, knowledge base, and AI-powered insights build up over time. The more you investigate, the smarter it gets.
tour.missionControlDesc: Ready for your first case? Hit this button, describe an incident, and watch CauseFlow trace the root cause across all your connected systems.
tour.billingDesc: Track your credits, upgrade your plan, or purchase extra investigation packs. Your 7-day trial starts now — make it count.
tour.completeDesc: You're cleared for duty, Detective. Go solve your first case — your team is counting on you.

savingHours.display: You saved ~{hours} hours this month with CauseFlow AI ({analyses} investigations)
